title: Gooey Smoky Fish Stir-fry
description: A tangy, gooey, adventurous Indian (Tamil) dish featuring spring onions and a touch of smokiness that is perfect for pescatarian-friendly meals.

ingredients.name: Tomato Puree
ingredients.notes: Commercially available or homemade with 2 ripe tomatoes and a pinch of salt

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add cumin seeds, curry leaves, and chilli powder to the hot pan. Toast for about 30 seconds or until fragrant.
Add chopped onions and cook till translucent (about 5 minutes).
Stir in tomato puree along with garam masala and turmeric powder. Simmer for another minute.
Fold in fish fillet slices, ensuring they are well coated. Season with salt to taste.
Cover the pan and simmer gently for about 10 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly and the fish is cooked through.
Serve hot garnished with spring onions.
